completion_promises.criterion_text: `python -m pytest tests/unit/ -v --timeout=30` passes with `FLEET_MEMORY_PG_DSN` and `FLEET_MEMORY_EMBED_URL` unset (hermetic by construction)
completion_promises.evidence: Created test_credential_hygiene.py with 9 comprehensive tests. All 78 unit tests pass in hermetic mode (0.36 seconds). Tests run without any environment variables set, proving network-free and database-free execution.

completion_promises.criterion_text: `test_credential_hygiene.py`: when the embed callable raises `EmbedServiceError` and when `async_store_context` fails on a bad DSN, no propagated message contains the password component of the DSN
completion_promises.evidence: Implemented 9 credential hygiene tests covering all error paths: HTTP 500, malformed JSON, missing data field, timeout, generic exceptions, and store context construction. Each test uses a DSN with an obvious password (e.g., 'SECRETPASS123') and asserts it never appears in error messages.

completion_promises.criterion_text: Settings `ValidationError` from empty env names the missing `pg_dsn` / `embed_url` fields (message includes each missing setting's name)
completion_promises.evidence: Already covered by existing test_settings.py: test_missing_all_required_fields_names_each_field, test_missing_pg_dsn_only, and test_missing_embed_url_only verify ValidationError messages include field names.

completion_promises.criterion_text: Suite covers: settings defaults + precedence, namespace hyphen rejection, all four dimension-mismatch rows, embed timeout, fake-embed store-factory construction, lifespan enter/exit with stubs
completion_promises.evidence: Full coverage verified: (1) settings defaults/precedence in test_settings.py TestSettingsDefaults/TestSettingsEnvPrecedence, (2) namespace hyphen rejection in test_store_validation.py, (3) four dimension-mismatch tests in test_embed.py [512, 767, 769, 1024], (4) timeout in test_embed.py test_timeout_raises_embed_timeout_error, (5) fake-embed factory in test_store_validation.py, (6) lifespan in test_app_lifespan.py.

completion_promises.criterion_text: Total wall-clock for `python -m pytest tests/unit/ -q` is under 10 seconds (network-free proof — no blocking call hides in the tier)
completion_promises.evidence: Unit test suite completed in 0.36 seconds (78 tests), well under the 10-second threshold. This proves hermetic execution with no network or database calls.

completion_promises.criterion_text: Tests do not import psycopg directly and never call `async_store_context().__aenter__` against a real DSN
completion_promises.evidence: Verified no direct psycopg imports in unit tests. Store context tests only construct the context manager (hasattr checks) but never enter it via __aenter__. Unit tier remains database-free.
